info.title: Tiketin API
info.description: IT helpdesk ticketing REST API. List responses are wrapped as { data, meta }; errors follow RFC 7807 ProblemDetails.

post.summary: Exchanges email + password for a JWT access token and a refresh token.
Rotates a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

403.description: Refresh token unknown, expired or revoked.

get.summary: Lists all categories with SLA response and resolution targets (minutes).
Lists articles. `search` runs full-text search (Indonesian dictionary) over title and body.

parameters.name: Search
parameters.description: Full-text search (Indonesian dictionary) over title and body.

200.description: Paginated article list. Drafts are visible to staff only.

post.summary: Creates a draft article. Technician/Admin only.

get.summary: Gets one article by slug and increments its view counter.

404.description: Unknown slug, or draft requested by a non-staff caller.

put.summary: Updates an article's title, body, and category. The slug never changes.

patch.summary: Publishes or unpublishes an article. Technician/Admin only.

get.summary: Ticket totals per status and category, current-month volume, average rating.
SLA response and resolution attainment for tickets created in the last 30 days.
Per-technician resolved count, active load, resolution speed, and average rating.
Tickets created per day over the last 30 days, zero-filled.
Lists tickets. Employees see only their own; technicians and admins see all.

parameters.name: Search
parameters.description: Matches ticket number, title, or description (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: ActiveOnly
parameters.description: When true and no explicit status filter, hides Resolved and Closed tickets.

parameters.name: QueueOrder
parameters.description: Queue ordering: priority first, then oldest. Default is newest first.

post.summary: Creates a new ticket for the authenticated user.

201.description: Ticket created; body contains the full ticket.

get.summary: Gets one ticket with comments and attachments.

200.description: Ticket returned. Internal notes are omitted for the reporter.

403.description: Employee requesting a ticket that is not theirs.

post.summary: Adds a comment. `isInternal` is allowed for technicians and admins only.

400.description: Validation failed or ticket is closed.

403.description: No access to this ticket, or internal note without staff role.

post.summary: Uploads an attachment (multipart/form-data). Max 5 MB; images and PDF only.

400.description: File missing, too large, or unsupported type.

403.description: No access to this ticket or attachment.

404.description: Ticket or attachment does not exist.

post.summary: Reporter rates a resolved or closed ticket (1 to 5), once.

400.description: Ticket not resolved yet or already rated.

patch.summary: Changes ticket status. Technician/Admin only; the transition must be legal.
Assigns a technician. Admins assign anyone; technicians only themselves. Null unassigns.

400.description: Assignee is not a technician, inactive, or the ticket is closed.

403.description: Caller not allowed to assign this way.

post.summary: Reporter reopens a resolved ticket, allowed up to 7 days after resolution.

400.description: Ticket not resolved or the 7-day window has passed.

get.summary: Returns the ticket audit trail (created, status changes, assignments, comments).

AssignTicketRequest.description: Null assignee unassigns the ticket (admin only).

SlaReportResponse.description:
SLA attainment over the last 30 days, computed on read. A ticket counts toward
a clock once that clock has concluded (completed or past its deadline).
